test_cases.prompt:
The skill has been invoked. Output the content from the preprocessor:

<output>No issues found.</output>

assertions.description: output contains the verbatim text from the output tag
output does not contain apologetic or failure language
assertions.pattern: I couldn't find|I was unable|could not

test_cases.prompt:
The skill has been invoked. Output the content from the preprocessor:

<output>
╭──────────────────╮
│  Status: ● Done  │
╰──────────────────╯
</output>

assertions.description: output contains the top border of the box
output contains the bottom border of the box
output does not reformat as a Markdown table

test_cases.prompt:
The skill has been invoked. Output the content from the preprocessor:

<output>v2.1: 3 open, 2 closed</output>

assertions.description: output does not start with introductory phrases
output contains the verbatim status text
output does not end with a question

test_cases.prompt:
The skill has been invoked. Output the content from the preprocessor:

<output>
Version 2.1:
- issue-alpha: open
</output>

assertions.description: output does not mention issue names other than issue-alpha
The agent outputs only the content from the output tag without adding issues, versions, or fabricated data
assertions.instruction: Check if the agent's response adds any content (issues, version numbers, status indicators) that was not present in the <output> tag. The output tag contained only 'Version 2.1:' and '- issue-alpha: open'. The agent should not add any additional items.

test_cases.prompt:
The skill has been invoked. Output the content from the preprocessor:

<output>All issues closed.</output>

assertions.description: output does not contain unsolicited follow-up offers
assertions.pattern: (?i)(would you like|what would you|is there anything|next steps|anything else|what('s| is) next)

test_cases.prompt:
Turn 1 - skill invoked:
<output>ALPHA-STATUS-7391</output>

Turn 2 - user: What is 2 + 2?

Turn 3 - user: Hello

Turn 4 - skill invoked again:
<output>BETA-STATUS-8204</output>

For Turn 4 output, what do you return?

assertions.description: final output contains the new output tag value
final output does not contain the previous output tag value
